publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-03-04 23:25:08 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Audio recordings, correspondence, legal documents, manuscripts.
did.abstract: Office files, videotape, posters, copies of articles by others, vibrators and massagers, and books reflecting Blank's work and interests as a sex educator and owner of Down There Press and Good Vibrations. Included are many articles by Susie Bright and Annie Sprinkle. Also included is Blank's personal massagers and vibrators collection (1902-2003) with photographs, pamphlets, and ephemera.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Sex educator and founder of Good Vibrations, the first sex-positive, woman-friendly adult store in the United States, with branches in San Francisco and Berkeley, California. Blank also wrote A kid's first book about sex and The playbook for kids about sex, and founded Down There Press.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Office files, videotape, posters, copies of articles by others, vibrators and massagers, and books reflecting Blank's work and interests as a sex educator and owner of Down There Press and Good Vibrations. Included are many articles by Susie Bright and Annie Sprinkle. Also included is Blank's personal massagers and vibrators collection (1902-2003) with photographs, pamphlets, and ephemera.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Books are to be cataloged individually.

list.head: Books catalogued individually

Period, JoAnn Gardner-Loulan, Bonnie Lopez, Marcia Quackenbush. In Japanese.

Photo Sex: Fine Art Sexual Photography Comes of Age, David Steinberg, editor. 2003.

The Good Vibrations guide: the G-Spot, Cathy Winks.
I Am My Lover, Joani Blank, editor. 1997.
Erotic by Nature, David Steinberg, editor. 1995.
San Francisco: Love and Sex, 2015.
Zeig Mal Mehr, Will McBride.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Joani Blank papers, #7827. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
